title: ED dizziness documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.
assessment.rationale: The exact DHA dizziness history section supports onset, duration, severity or impact, associated symptoms, relevant negatives and clinician risk context without inferring a vestibular, cardiovascular or neurological cause.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness
source.population: People presenting with dizziness; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth dizziness documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

assessment.text: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.
assessment.rationale: The exact red-flag section supports recording vital data, appearance and time-critical symptoms only when assessed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Dizziness
source.population: People presenting with dizziness; age limits are not stated in the applicability section.

source.exclusions: Direct for Dubai telehealth dizziness documentation; partial for a general in-person GP workflow.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.

assessment.text: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.
assessment.rationale: The exact investigation section supports recording existing test or imaging status only when already performed or reviewed.

assessment.text: Identifies emergency and specialist referral features for dizziness.
assessment.rationale: The exact referral section supports documenting escalation, specialist discussion or follow-up only when clinician-decided or arranged.

assessment.text: Emphasises structured history and available examination to distinguish dizziness syndromes.
assessment.rationale: The virtual clinical-assessment recommendation was reviewed; no bedside test or diagnosis is auto-selected.
